calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-26-2005 Continued To Oct-31-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-31-2005 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Court Trial/Prove-Up.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Floyd Butler.
Michael Hall, Esq. for for Plaintiff: P.H.D. Holdings, Inc.
Plaintiff's Witness: James Roth was sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by the Defendant: Corinne Murphy.
Exhibit 1 - Lease Agreement-------------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2 - Three-Day Notice------------------------ID/EVID.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant as follows:
Restitution and possession of the premises located at 2355 Scott St., #101, San Francisco.
Back Rent and Damages of $4,976.00
Attorney's Fees $825.00
Costs $237.60
Rental Agreement declared forfeited.
Counsel stipulated for the return of the Exhibits in open court.
Judgment signed in open court.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Oct-31-2005 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-26-2005 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: MICHAEL C HALL FOR PLAINTIFF PHD HOLDINGS,INC
NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT CORINNE MURPHY

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE OFF CALENDAR. JURY DEMAND STRICKEN. TO PROCEED AS COURT TRIAL.
